question: Bitcoin below $52K before March 31, 2026?
resolution_criteria:
Yes if the Coinbase BTC-USD 1-minute candle low is ≤ $52,000 any time from market creation (Nov 21, 2025 PT) through March 31, 2026 23:59 PT; otherwise No.

Source: Coinbase (BTC-USD).

Resolution: March 31, 2026, 23:59 PT, or earlier upon trigger.
